rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the spread keeps returning to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. In Past, Fox (14) shows where things already stand: discernment prevents avoidable errors. Fox often points to defensive strategy, over-reading, or self-protective caution that can make the true path harder to trust in your calling. Present centers on Lily (30), where maturity and principled calm support the path becomes the point that can redirect the whole sequence. Lily often points to steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions, especially where maturity, peace, and ethics have been building quietly in your calling. Looking ahead, Future with Bear (15) points toward strength can protect if paired with fairness, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care. Bear often points to strength can protect if paired with fairness, and the need to use leverage responsibly in your calling. Fox (14) and Bear (15) reveal the deeper logic of the path, and it points to tactical caution with resource power. Lily (30) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Lily colors your calling through the maturity, peace, and ethics layer of the situation, especially where steady ethics stabilize long-term decisions. Fox (14) with Bear (15) keep emphasizing tactical caution with resource power. Pair composure with clear intent so Bear (15) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
